subcodes.first_line: O sweet branch of the sanctified and divine Lote-Tree! Give thanks to the one true Lord that He has enabled thee to attain the greatest of all heavenly blessings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع ملیح سدره مبارکه الهیه شکر کن حضرت احدیت را که موفق بر اعظم مواهب
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Shrines and Holy places, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @service to others; to the Cause of God
